title: StarConnect
description: Global professional consultant platform — a distributed system of 10+ independently deployable microservices with real-time chat, WebRTC video calls, schedule-based booking, and multi-gateway payments.
impact: 10+ services, ~75% test coverage, zero cross-service failure propagation in production

title: Doob
description: Multi-vendor marketplace and service platform — a unified API serving vendors, admins, and mobile clients with RBAC, real-time notifications, ACID-compliant payments, and zero-downtime AWS deploys.
impact: Significantly reduced p95 response times; zero inconsistent payment records under sustained production traffic

title: Multi-Vendor ERP System
description: Complex ERP platform for real clients — inventory management, multi-warehouse logistics integration with Pathao, Steadfast, and Daraz, and full payment reconciliation with bKash, Nagad, and Amarpay.
impact: Live in production with real clients and real uptime expectations

title: Real-Time Chat & Video Infrastructure
description: Chat and video call layer built across StarConnect's microservices — Socket.IO rooms, WebRTC signalling, APNs push notifications, and RabbitMQ-backed message delivery guarantees.
impact: Supports concurrent video sessions and real-time messaging with isolated failure domains
